languages.text: "Пожалуй, я сохраню вашу тайну. Но помните, вы должны мне услугу".

traits.locale_text: "Пожалуй, я сохраню вашу тайну. Но помните, вы должны мне услугу".

languages.text: "I suppose I can keep your secret. But remember, you owe me."
languages.original_text: "Пожалуй, я сохраню вашу тайну. Но помните, вы должны мне услугу".

traits.locale_text: "I suppose I can keep your secret. But remember, you owe me."
"I suppose I can keep your secret. But remember, you owe me."
"I suppose I can keep your secret. But remember, you owe me."

languages.text: “我可以替你保守秘密。但记住，你欠我一个人情。”
languages.original_text: "I suppose I can keep your secret. But remember, you owe me."

traits.locale_text: “我可以替你保守秘密。但记住，你欠我一个人情。”

languages.text: « Je suppose que je peux garder votre secret, mais n'oubliez pas que vous avez une dette envers moi. »
languages.original_text: "I suppose I can keep your secret. But remember, you owe me."

traits.locale_text: « Je suppose que je peux garder votre secret, mais n'oubliez pas que vous avez une dette envers moi. »

languages.text: "Sanırım sırrını saklayabilirim. Fakat unutma, bana borçlusun."
languages.original_text: "I suppose I can keep your secret. But remember, you owe me."

traits.locale_text: "Sanırım sırrını saklayabilirim. Fakat unutma, bana borçlusun."

languages.text: «Supongo que puedo guardarle el secreto. Pero recuerde que está en deuda conmigo».
languages.original_text: "I suppose I can keep your secret. But remember, you owe me."

traits.locale_text: «Supongo que puedo guardarle el secreto. Pero recuerde que está en deuda conmigo».

languages.text: "Ich denke, ich kann Euer Geheimnis für mich behalten. Aber dafür schuldet Ihr mir etwas."
languages.original_text: "I suppose I can keep your secret. But remember, you owe me."

traits.locale_text: "Ich denke, ich kann Euer Geheimnis für mich behalten. Aber dafür schuldet Ihr mir etwas."

languages.text: 「君の秘密は守るよ。でも覚えておいてくれ、君はお礼を言わなければならない。」
languages.original_text: "I suppose I can keep your secret. But remember, you owe me."

traits.locale_text: 「君の秘密は守るよ。でも覚えておいてくれ、君はお礼を言わなければならない。」
